title: WONDERLAND CAKE MAKER
description: To make the cakes that will then be served to various customers from across various kingdoms, follow the instructions given by Alice, the main character, as well as those of Cookie, a recipe book that can speak, since it knows the way the ingredients need to be mixed and prepared the best.
instructions: Use the mouse to follow the instructions and prepare the recipes correctly cooking one amazing cake after another and satisfying all your hungry customers Don t waste any time start this amazing experience right now and make sure to tell your friends
